name: Desiccating Burst Crystal
description: All the moisture seems to have been sapped from this brittle, gray weapon, as if it's been buried below shifting sands for centuries. A desiccating burst weapon functions as a desiccating weapon. In addition, the weapon explodes with a dehydrating blast on a successful critical hit, dealing extra damage. Critical ×2: 1d8 (2d8 plant/water elemental). ×3: 2d8 (4d8). ×4: 3d8 (6d8). The critical hit renders the struck creature fatigued for 8 hours or until it consumes at least 1 gallon of water or some other rehydrating liquid. This is a continuous effect and requires no activation. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A brittle, gray weapon augmentation crystal.
